meta.title: 5 NEW AI Tools That Will Change The Future
meta.description:
With so many new Ai tools launching every day which Ai tools should you be excited about? In this AI news Update I talk you through various new ai tools that you can already use or that will soon be available. I will also show you ai alternatives to the tools that aren't yet available. Let me know in the comments which tools you are most exited about. 

HeyGen Walking avatars
https://demo.heygen.com/avatar-in-motion

Sora AI Trailer that looks like a horror movie
https://youtu.be/F_WfIzYGlg4?si=a7GAF4NGH2yYKuIk

Opus Clip, Clip Anything
https://bit.ly/4cWpY0m

Elevenlabs SFX
https://bit.ly/3LmQB2G

Topics covered
- AI avatars are getting crazy
- Sora AI keeps teasing us, for now we got the best sora ai alternative
- Clip Anything will be launched soon
- Claude AI Outperforms ChatGPT
- Elevenlabs just got better

📧 For business inquiries: business@dankieft.com
